hero.name: Donathan
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer | Full-Stack

about.title: About
about.content: I am a Full-Stack Software Developer with experience in creating innovative and efficient solutions. Passionate about technology, I constantly seek to learn new tools and methodologies to deliver high-quality products.

jobs.description: Focus on educational full-stack projects and automation of internal processes (ETL).

jobs.role: Internship of Immersion and International Experience
jobs.description: Advanced English language improvement and multicultural experience, developing adaptability and communication.

jobs.role: Tech Lead & Technical Instructor of TI
jobs.description: Technical leadership and development of competence management system. Implementation of agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
Development of automation scripts and creation of management dashboards.

items.title: Copel Innovation Solution
items.description: MVP focused on solving energy bottlenecks. I was responsible for the front-end architecture and system integration during the high-pressure competition.

items.title: Competence Management System
items.description: Complete platform for mapping employee skills, including management dashboards and access control.

items.title: ETL Data Pipeline
items.description: Automation scripts for extracting, transforming, and loading raw data for subsequent strategic visualization.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk?
contact.description: I am open to new opportunities and challenges. If you have a position, a project or just want to exchange an idea about technology, feel free to send me a message!

footer.built: Developed with React, Tailwind CSS and Vite.
